title.purpose: Domain score cards and minor headers.

label.purpose: Table headers, search chips, and badges.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button, used for form submissions and critical flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #f2c12e; color: #080808; padding: 10px 28px; font-size: 12.8px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 2px; height: 43px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #d9ab23; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form input field for search and geolocation input.
components.html: <input type="text" class="ds-input-text" placeholder="Enter a city name…" />
components.css: .ds-input-text { background: #111111; color: #efefef; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07); border-radius: 2px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 16.8px; line-height: 28.6px; height: 43px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.15s ease-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-out; } .ds-input-text::placeholder { color: #666666; } .ds-input-text:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(242, 193, 46, 0.4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(242, 193, 46, 0.2); }

narrative.overview: Geoscout is designed as a structured, technical journal for geographical analysis. It rejects the overly friendly, soft, pastel visual language common in modern consumer SaaS in favor of a dark, low-distraction environment optimized for intense data readability and expert density.
keyCharacteristics: Void & Amber Palette: High-contrast interface relying on an pure black background, deep gray containers, and a single vivid signal amber accent color.
Flat Layouts: Zero shadows or decorative gradients; physical layers are distinguished purely through flat background colors and fine border lines.
Typographic Order: Strong font-size hierarchy and generous line height ensuring long-form report prose remains highly readable.

rules.name: The 10% Accent Rule
rules.body: The primary Signal Amber must cover ≤10% of any page surface. It must be reserved for directional cues, interactive feedback, and status indicators.

rules.name: The Flat Boundary Rule
rules.body: No box-shadows or drop-shadows may be used under any card, dialog, or input. Boundary lines are established exclusively via 1px solid lines using white/[0.07].

dos: Do wrap all report text in a max-width container of 75ch to ensure lines are easy to scan.
Do use uppercase and wide tracking (0.06em or more) on small label elements to make them look structured and intentional.
Do maintain a strict 4.5:1 text-to-background contrast ratio for all secondary and tertiary body text.
donts: Don't use colored side-stripes or vertical accent lines on cards or report callout boxes.
Don't add linear or radial gradients to text headings.
Don't introduce box-shadows or blur-filters to cards or buttons.
Don't use generic rounded buttons (rounded-lg or rounded-full) for primary actions; keep button corners sharp.
